forumSession.title: Forum Session
forumSession.description: Source forum access. Required to index and search non-public information.
forumSession.invalidDescription: Start authentication to open the browser and log in manually.

offlineMode.title: Offline Mode
offlineMode.description: Disables all requests to the external forum. Useful for purely local navigation.
offlineMode.label: Enable Offline Mode
offlineMode.footer: When enabled, the app will navigate faster using only the database.

downloadPath.title: Download Directory
downloadPath.description: Folder where the server will save games and check for existing files.
downloadPath.label: Folder Path
downloadPath.footer: The system will create an .index.json file in this folder for automatic validation.

indexer.title: Automatic Indexer (Worker)
indexer.description: Control the automated process of searching and extracting games from the forum.
indexer.captchaDescription: The forum's anti-bot has been activated. Please solve the captcha to continue.

language.title: Language Settings
language.description: Configure the interface and translation languages.

interface.label: Interface Language
interface.description: Choose the language for the application interface.

translation.label: Translation Language
translation.description: Choose the language for game descriptions and titles (scraped from the forum).
translation.warning: Warning: Changing the translation language with an existing database will require rebuilding the database to translate everything. Rebuilding individual game databases will also use this language.

inventory.title: Inventory Manager (.index.json)
inventory.description: Edit or remove index file entries manually to resolve bugs or freezes.
inventory.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to remove this entry? The physical file will remain on disk.

status.noGamesDesc: Try changing the filters or start the indexer in settings.
status.error: Error loading games. Check if the backend is running.

folders.title: Physical Files on HD
folders.noFolders: No folders found in this directory.
folders.checkSettings: Check if the path is correct in Settings
folders.removeConfirm:
Do you want to remove the indexing of this folder?

This will disconnect the folder from the game in the Library, but the game will NOT be deleted from your PC.
folders.indexedMessage: This folder is already linked to game ID {{id}}. Double-click to unindex.
folders.noApk: No APK file detected in this folder.

update.upToDate: Your app is up to date!

sideload.title: Sideload
sideload.description: Manage and install games directly on your Quest.

connectionStatus.title: Connection Status
connectionStatus.noDeviceDesc: Connect your Quest via USB and enable developer mode.

install.title: Install on Device
install.noPath: Download folder not configured. Go to settings.
install.noGames: No games in local folder to install.
install.phase1ObbSecond: Phase 1/2: Moving second OBB to device
install.successDesc: The game "{{name}}" was successfully installed on your VR device. You can now disconnect the cable if you wish.
install.failDesc: An error occurred while trying to install "{{name}}". Check the USB connection and available space on the device.

apps.title: Apps on Device
apps.selectDevice: Select a device to see installed apps.
apps.confirmUninstall: Do you really want to uninstall {}?
apps.systemAppWarn1: [WARNING 1/5] The app '{}' belongs to the CORE SYSTEM. Removing it can BREAK the headset. Are you sure?
apps.systemAppWarn2: [WARNING 2/5] The headset might lose features, the store, or get stuck in a bootloop. Continue?
apps.systemAppWarn3: [WARNING 3/5] The only way to fix this might be a Factory Reset. Proceed?
apps.systemAppWarn4: [WARNING 4/5] Are you ABSOLUTELY sure of what you are doing with '{}'?
apps.systemAppWarn5: [WARNING 5/5] LAST WARNING. The removal cannot be undone. Confirm DELETION?

auth.title: RuTracker Authentication
auth.description: Enter your credentials to log in to the forum. Authentication will be processed securely in the background.
auth.captchaPossibleError: The captcha might be incorrect. Try again.

actions.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the files from the server. Are you sure?
actions.removeGameConfirm: This will remove the game from your library and permanently delete the server files. Are you sure?

stats.statsOnlyDesc: Updates Seeds, Leechers and download count.
stats.fullRebuildDesc: Fetches and rewrites all info from the original post.
stats.rebuildConfirm: This will rebuild EVERYTHING (description, image, tags). Continue?

description.title: Description
description.clickTranslate: Click the translation button to read in your language.

game.installed: This game is already in your downloads folder

admin.title: Database Administration
admin.description: View and manually edit games inserted by the Scraper.

actions.clearWarning: Warning: Are you sure? {{remaining}} remaining confirmations before losing all data.

failed.title: Scraping Failures
failed.description: URLs that could not be processed due to errors.
failed.status: Items saved here will not appear in the main catalog until processed.

blacklist.title: Blacklist
blacklist.description: Topics listed here are ignored and will not show in the App.

edit.title: Edit Game
edit.description: Change stored information (original title, tags) in the database.

backup.title: Import Database
backup.description: A valid backup was found. Continuing will DELETE your current database and apply the backup data.

rebuildAll.confirm: This will re-scrape ALL games in the database to update translations to {{lang}}. This may take a long time and depends on your internet/session. Continue?

footer.description: Automated system to catalog, download and locally install VR content.

setup.title: Welcome to VRSideForge
setup.description: Let's configure your environment in a few steps

step1.title: Language
step1.description: Select the language for the interface and the games library.

step2.title: ADB & Device
step2.description: Checking if Android Debug Bridge (ADB) is installed.
step2.successPathOnly: ADB Found! No connected device detected.
step2.fail: ADB is missing in Environment Variables. The 'adb' command is not recognized in Terminal.

step3.title: qBittorrent Engine
step3.failNotRunning: qBittorrent doesn't seem to be running. Open it and try again.
step3.failRunningNoWebUI:
Warning: qBittorrent is running but WebUI is off. To fix:
1. Open Tools > Options > Web UI.
2. Enable Web UI.
3. Set IP to 127.0.0.1 and Port to 8080.
4. Keep Username and Password as admin/adminadmin.

step6.title: Indexer
step6.description: Start scraping the games library from the forum. You can do this later.

step5.title: Games Folder
step5.description: Where your games will be saved and extracted.

step4.title: RuTracker Session
step4.description: The games source. Authenticate to enable downloads.
step4.waiting: Waiting for login in the browser...
step4.info: Browser opened. Log in to RuTracker...
